title: tunas fragilis
intro:
Tunas fragilis is a plant species also known as Fragilis, but it is actually likely referring to the Tunas fragilis is actually also known as  'Soursop's relative' but  this is actually referring to the Annona diversifolia and the Annona glabra species. 

Annona diversifolia is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Annona diversifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, as well as its potential to prevent certain types of cancer. 

Annona diversifolia can be prepared in various ways, including as a tea, a tincture, or a decoction, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
